SU2001_ B/K74ph2 _V2

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 6E
Func Name: BVA

[
  {
    "minbytes": 27,
    "sentbytes": "2190",
    "name": "Données Génériques",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Alerte température huile de boite": {
        "firstbyte": 22,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Allumage voyant défaut BVA au TdB": {
        "firstbyte": 22,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 25,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 24,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true,

        "bitoffset": 5,

  {
    "minbytes": 34,
    "sentbytes": "1200040000",
    "name": "READ FREEZE FRAME",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Alerte temp. huile": {
        "firstbyte": 27,

        "firstbyte": 4,

  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "MoreDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Type Of Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "NDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Historical Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Current Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Standard Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Specific Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "10C0",
    "name": "START DIAG SESSION",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Mode du diag": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "10C0",
    "name": "Start Diagnostic Session",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Session Name": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 6,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "31C001",
    "name": "Statut séquence activation sorties",
    "deny_sds": [],

      "état status séquence act. sorties": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "bitoffset": 7,
        "endian": "Big"

        "endian": "Big"

        "firstbyte": 4,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 6,
        "endian": "Big"

        "bitoffset": 7,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "bitoffset": 6,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "bitoffset": 7,
        "endian": "Big"

        "bitoffset": 5,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "82",
    "name": "STOP COM",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Stop communication OK": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "3E",
    "name": "TESTER PRESENT",
    "deny_sds": [],
